# Redeemr

> Digital loyalty and rewards for restaurants. Customers collect stamps or points by scanning a QR code at participating venues and redeem them for free items, discounts, and perks.

Redeemr replaces paper punch cards with a phone-based stamp and points system. Restaurants run their loyalty programme from a vendor dashboard; customers track every card from one wallet view.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of how Redeemr works and featured restaurants.
- [Restaurants](/restaurants): Browse participating restaurants, filter by cuisine and location.
- [Rewards](/rewards): Available rewards customers can redeem.
- [For Businesses](/business): Vendor subscription information and pricing.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about earning, redeeming, QR scanning, and vendor onboarding.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Redeemr team.

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
